ogTitle: Elwomple vs Emu Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Elwomple and Emu Bay.
heading: Elwomple vs Emu Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Elwomple, South Australia and Emu Bay, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elwomple has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Emu Bay (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Elwomple or Emu Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Elwomple has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Emu Bay scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Elwomple scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Emu Bay scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Elwomple or Emu Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elwomple has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
